name: AI Privacy Boundary
rules: Private data stays local when Ollama is the configured provider
Cloud providers (Anthropic, OpenAI) are only used when the user explicitly enables them in AI settings
No silent fallback from local Ollama to cloud providers - if Ollama is offline, surface the error
AI tool results (inventory lookups, barcode suggestions, CSV previews) are suggestions only
AI never makes canonical inventory changes without explicit user confirmation
Chat conversations are stored locally in SQLite, never sent to external analytics
AI setup wizard must clearly disclose which provider is active and what data leaves the machine
Privacy page must accurately reflect current provider configuration
Inventory data sent to AI tools is scoped to what the query needs - never dump full database
AI provider configuration in ai_config table is user-controlled - never auto-switch providers
